---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Publications — Erika C. Freeman"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/build.py from data/publications.yml — do not edit by hand. -->

::: {.section-label}
Publications
:::
::: {.section-title}
publications
:::

::: {.pubs-cols}

::: {.pubs-col}
## First-author publications (11)

::: {.group-label}
Published
:::

::: {.pub}
[Logging Disrupts the Ecology of Molecules in Headwater Streams.](https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2409104122)
[PNAS · 2025]{.pub-venue}
[with Emilson EJS, Webster K, Dittmar T, Tanentzap AJ]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Molecular Diversity of Dissolved Organic Matter Reflects Macroecological Patterns in River Networks.](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-025-12835-5)
[Scientific Reports · 2025]{.pub-venue}
[with McClure EA, Mudunuru ML, Ward CS, Bottos EM, González-Pinzón R, Feeser KL, Krause S, Peña J, Newcomer ME]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Ecosystem ecology needs an ecology of molecules.](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0169534724003148)
[Trends in Ecology and Evolution · 2025]{.pub-venue}
[with Tianna Peller, Florian Altermatt]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Ticking Clock.](https://www.science.org/content/article/women-academia-having-children-can-feel-impossible-talking-about-it-makes-us-feel-less) &nbsp; *[[Most popular Working Life essays of 2024](https://www.science.org/content/article/perfecting-academic-writing-facing-fraud-science-s-top-personal-essays-year)]*
[Science · 2024]{.pub-venue}
[with Cecilia Padilla-Iglesias\*]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Cyanobacteria in the Anthropocene — synanthropism forged in an era of global change.](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/wer.11066)
[Water Environmental Research · 2024]{.pub-venue}
[with Erratt KJ\*]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Universal Microbial Processes Rework Dissolved Organic Matter along Environmental Gradients.](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-023-44431-4)
[Nature Communications · 2024]{.pub-venue}
[with Emilson EJS, Braga L, Emilson C, Martineau C, Dittmar T, Goldhammer T, Singer G, Tanentzap AJ]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Global Changes May Be Promoting a Rise in Select Cyanobacteria in Nutrient-poor Northern Lakes.](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1111/gcb.15189)
[Global Change Biology · 2020]{.pub-venue}
[with Jones B, Bergstrom AK, Creed IF]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Turning on the Tap: Demand for Resources as a Driver of Change in the Boreal Zone, Canada.](https://cdnsciencepub.com/doi/10.1139/er-2018-0064)
[Environmental Reviews · 2019]{.pub-venue}
[with Erdozain M\*, Daillaire CO\*, Teichert S, Creed IF, Nelson HW]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.group-label}
Under review
:::

::: {.pub}
When molecules matter for ecosystem management.
[Frontiers in Ecology and the Environment]{.pub-venue}
[with Florian Altermatt]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.group-label}
In advanced preparation
:::

::: {.pub}
Examining the Efficacy of Fluorescence Spectroscopy to Detect Forest Harvest in Temperate and Boreal Forests.
[for JGR: Biogeosciences]{.pub-venue}
[with Tanentzap AJ, Emilson EJS, Dittmar T]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
Leveraging community ecology to understand dissolved organic matter.
[for Frontiers in Ecology and the Environment]{.pub-venue}
[with Florian Altermatt, Roman Alter]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #a8a8a8; margin-top: 1.5rem;"}
\* equal contribution
:::

:::

::: {.pubs-col}
## Contributing-author publications (11)

::: {.group-label}
Published
:::

::: {.pub}
[Wildfires Change Summertime Dissolved Organic Matter in Boreal Headwater Streams.](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1029/2025JG008980)
[JGR Biogeosciences · 2025]{.pub-venue}
[Matula E, Emilson EJS, Smenderovac E, Fonvielle J, **Freeman EC**, Tanentzap AJ]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Making Waves: Deep Cyanobacteria Layers Pose a "Known Unknown" Risk to Water Security.](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acs.est.2c06928)
[Water Security · 2023]{.pub-venue}
[Erratt KJ, Creed IF, **Freeman EC**, Trick C]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Exploring Global River Corridor OM Chemistry through the Ecological Concept of Core-satellite Species.](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/water/articles/10.3389/frwa.2022.870453/full)
[Frontiers in Water · 2023]{.pub-venue}
[Stadler M, de Melo M, Garayburu-Caruso V, **Freeman EC**, Bice K, Mateus-Barros E, Lu Y, Barnard M, Cheng S, Dwivedi D, Tanentzap A, Meile C]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Determining the Biogeochemical Transformations of Organic Matter Composition in Global Rivers Using Molecular Signatures.](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/water/articles/10.3389/frwa.2023.1005792/full)
[Frontiers in Water · 2023]{.pub-venue}
[Buser-Young J, Garcia P, Schrenk M, Regier P, Ward ND, Biçe K, Brooks S, **Freeman EC**, Lønborg C]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Deep Cyanobacteria Layers: An Overlooked Aspect of Managing Risks of Cyanobacteria.](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acs.est.2c06928)
[Environmental Science & Technology · 2022]{.pub-venue}
[Erratt KJ, Creed IF, **Freeman EC**, Westrick J, Trick CG, Birbeck J, Watson L, Zastepa A]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[It Takes a Village: Using a Crowdsourced Approach to Investigate Organic Matter Composition in Global Rivers Through the Lens of Ecological Theory.](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/water/articles/10.3389/frwa.2022.870453/full)
[Frontiers in Water · 2022]{.pub-venue}
[Borton MA, Collins SM, Graham EB, Garayburu-Caruso VA, Goldman AE, de Melo M, **Freeman EC**, & WHONDRS Crowdsourced Consortium]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Feasibility of Instance Segmentation of Phytoplankton Using Brightfield Microscopy & Deep Learning.](https://openjournals.uwaterloo.ca/index.php/vsl/article/view/4868)
[Journal of Computational Vision and Imaging Systems · 2021]{.pub-venue}
[Deglint JL, Park JA, **Freeman EC**, Erratt KJ, Allaf MM, Wong A]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Global Maps of Soil Temperature.](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/gcb.16060)
[Global Change Biology · 2021]{.pub-venue}
[Lembrechts J, Van den Hoogen J, Aalto J, Ashcroft M, De Frenne P, Kemppinen J, **Freeman EC**, & Hoffrén R]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
[Global Change-driven Effects on Dissolved Organic Matter Composition: Implications for Food Webs of Northern Lakes.](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1111/gcb.14129)
[Global Change Biology · 2018]{.pub-venue}
[Creed IF, Bergstrom AK, Trick CG, Grimm NB, Hessen DO, Karlsson J, Kidd KA, Kritzberg E, McKnight DM, **Freeman EC**, Senar OE, & others]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.group-label}
In advanced preparation
:::

::: {.pub}
The Microclimate DataBase — turning the global SoilTemp project into an accessible archive for microclimate data.
[for Scientific Data]{.pub-venue}
[Beugnon, Cheneka et al. 2025]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.group-label}
Technical reports
:::

::: {.pub}
Protocol for the analysis of phytoplankton using the FlowCAM® from Fluid Imaging Technologies.
[Standard Operating Procedure 001-2016 · 2016]{.pub-venue}
[Creed IF, Trick CG, **Freeman EC**, Oakes B]{.pub-authors}
:::

:::

:::
